# programs.claude-code

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `programs.claude-code`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| ------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `programs.claude-code.agents` | `attribute set of (strings concatenated with “\n” or absolute path)` | Custom agents for Claude Code. The attribute name becomes the agent filename, and the value is either: |
| `programs.claude-code.agentsDir` | `null or absolute path` | Path to a directory containing agent files for Claude Code. Agent files from this directory will be symlinked to .claude/agents/. |
| `programs.claude-code.commands` | `attribute set of (strings concatenated with “\n” or absolute path)` | Custom commands for Claude Code. The attribute name becomes the command filename, and the value is either: |
| `programs.claude-code.commandsDir` | `null or absolute path` | Path to a directory containing command files for Claude Code. Command files from this directory will be symlinked to .claude/commands/. |
| `programs.claude-code.configDir` | | |
| `programs.claude-code.context` | | |
| `programs.claude-code.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Claude Code, Anthropic’s official CLI. |
| `programs.claude-code.enableMcpIntegration` | `boolean` | Whether to integrate the MCP servers config from programs.mcp.servers into programs.opencode.settings.mcp . |
| `programs.claude-code.finalPackage` | | |
| `programs.claude-code.hooks` | `attribute set of strings concatenated with “\n”` | Custom hooks for Claude Code. The attribute name becomes the hook filename, and the value is the hook script content. Hooks are stored in .claude/hooks/ directory. |
| `programs.claude-code.hooksDir` | `null or absolute path` | Path to a directory containing hook files for Claude Code. Hook files from this directory will be symlinked to .claude/hooks/. |
| `programs.claude-code.lspServers` | `attribute set of (JSON value)` | LSP (Language Server Protocol) servers configuration. |
| `programs.claude-code.marketplaces` | `attribute set of (package or absolute path)` | Custom marketplaces for Claude Code plugins. The attribute name becomes the marketplace name, and the value is either: |
| `programs.claude-code.mcpServers` | `attribute set of (JSON value)` | MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers configuration |
| `programs.claude-code.memory.source` | `null or absolute path` | Path to a file containing memory content for CLAUDE.md. This option is mutually exclusive with memory.text. |
| `programs.claude-code.memory.text` | `null or strings concatenated with “\n”` | Inline memory content for CLAUDE.md. This option is mutually exclusive with memory.source. |
| `programs.claude-code.outputStyles` | `attribute set of (strings concatenated with “\n” or absolute path)` | Custom output styles for Claude Code. The attribute name becomes the base of the output style filename. The value is either: |
| `programs.claude-code.package` | `null or package` | The claude-code package to use. |
| `programs.claude-code.plugins` | `list of (package or absolute path)` | List of plugins to use when running Claude Code. Each entry is either: |
| `programs.claude-code.rules` | `attribute set of (strings concatenated with “\n” or absolute path)` | Modular rule files for Claude Code. The attribute name becomes the rule filename, and the value is either: |
| `programs.claude-code.rulesDir` | `null or absolute path` | Path to a directory containing rule files for Claude Code. Rule files from this directory will be symlinked to .claude/rules/. All markdown files in this directory are automatically loaded as project memory. |
| `programs.claude-code.settings` | `JSON value` | JSON configuration for Claude Code settings.json |
| `programs.claude-code.skills` | `attribute set of (strings concatenated with “\n” or absolute path)` | Custom skills for Claude Code. The attribute name becomes the skill directory name, and the value is either: |
| `programs.claude-code.skillsDir` | `null or absolute path` | Path to a directory containing skill directories for Claude Code. Each skill directory should contain a SKILL.md entrypoint file. Skill directories from this path will be symlinked to .claude/skills/. |
